decision_summary.rationale: CPU utilization (38.7% P99) confirms m5.medium is sufficient for backup workloads while maintaining safety margins.

llm_response.technical_explanation: The m5.large instance (i-a008) is running at 38.7% P99 CPU utilization, well below the 50% threshold for safe downgrading. The m5.medium offers equivalent performance for backup workloads while reducing costs by 50%.

risks: Backup performance degradation if CPU spikes exceed 50% during peak operations
risk_assessment.verification_steps: Monitor CPU utilization for 72 hours post-downgrade to confirm stable performance

nl_quality.name: nl_quality
nl_quality.details: The report is numerically precise and specific to this resource, but misattributes the CPU metric to the backup instance rather than correctly citing the primary (app-primary-prod) P99 at 38.7% as the basis for the secondary-safe algorithm, and omits explicit mention of the backup role and the cross-instance safety logic.
